_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: The difference in power between groups was significant for delta (F(1,28) = 7.135, p = 0.012, ηp2 = 0.203) and theta (F(1,28) = 9.145, p = 0.005, ηp2 = 0.246)
details: Successfully recorded EEG data during resting state and working memory tasks, detecting significant group differences in delta (F(1,28) = 7.135, p = 0.012) and theta (F(1,28) = 9.145, p = 0.005) power between NF1 and control groups
